diagrams.title: Triple Bottom Line Framework
diagrams.description: Three intersecting circles showing People, Planet, and Profit dimensions with their overlapping sustainable zone
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the three pillars of sustainability and how they interrelate for balanced organizational performance

diagrams.title: PUE Calculation Diagram
diagrams.description: Visual representation showing total facility energy divided by IT equipment energy to derive PUE metric
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how PUE is calculated and what values indicate efficient data center operations

diagrams.title: IT Asset Life Cycle
diagrams.description: Circular diagram showing stages from design to disposal with green considerations at each phase
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the complete lifecycle and environmental touchpoints for sustainable IT management

diagrams.title: Green IT Investment Decision Factors
diagrams.description: Balance scale showing environmental benefits and financial returns converging for sustainable decisions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that green IT investments require balancing both environmental and economic considerations
